svg.aria-label: What Ravi is building: Aikyat Mail, the reference-card protocol, Throughline
svg.text: AI email client across Gmail, Outlook, and 40+ providers, built solo. FastAPI · pgvector · Flutter.
I designed the spec: a cited reference opens in the reader's permissions, never the sender's.
Permission-safe semantic search. The nearest neighbor is denied if it isn't yours.
